Elegant Accommodation: Egret Safari Lodge in Katunguru offers comfortable camping with family rooms and private bathrooms. Each unit features a terrace or balcony, garden views, and a private entrance.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy a restaurant, bar, and outdoor fireplace. Free WiFi is available throughout the property. Additional amenities include an outdoor seating area, picnic spots, and bicycle parking.
Delicious Dining: Breakfast options include continental and vegan selections with warm dishes, juice, pancakes, and fruits. Themed dinner nights provide a unique dining experience.
Prime Location: Located 10 km from Queen Elizabeth National Park and 25 km from Kyambura Game Reserve, the lodge is 42 km from Kasese Airport.

Elegant Accommodation: Entikko Safari Lodge in Fajao offers 5-star comfort with family rooms, balconies, and private bathrooms. Each room features air-conditioning, free WiFi, and modern amenities.
